items.title: A few thoughs about AI videos
items.summary:
For the past few months I've created lots of videos using AI. Most of them are 3d animal short stories.
Got 650k followers in Tiktok. 
An interesting finding:
For image generation, gemini's nano banana is the king. All other models are just good to be the followers...
For video generation, there are many choices, veo3 is a good choice, sora2 was once the king but "dead" now... models from china like alibaba/bytedance/kling are evolving quickly, especially seedance 2.0 - which is considered a GPT-moment in video generation. Anyone here works with AI videos too? Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47713279 Points: 1 # Comments: 0
